What Makes This One Special

⚡
Factory Performance Package
Red brake calipers, lowered sport suspension, and 21" Uberturbine wheels in gloss black — straight from Tesla's factory.
🛞
Fresh Michelin Tires (Apr 2025)
All four Michelin Pilot Sport AS 4 tires replaced at Tesla Sunnyvale by Tesla-certified technicians. Premium rubber, zero concerns.
🤍
White Vegan Leather Interior
Bright, clean white interior in excellent condition — a striking contrast to the Deep Blue exterior.
🌉
Bay Area Car, Well Loved
No harsh winters, no rust, no drama. Just California miles on a well-maintained EV with full service records.
🤖
Tesla Autopilot Included
Comes with full Autopilot — Autosteer, Traffic-Aware Cruise Control, Auto Lane Change, and Navigate on Autopilot. Full Self-Driving (FSD) is available to the new owner via Tesla's monthly subscription.
🔌
Mobile Charging Cable Included
Tesla Mobile Connector (20' cable) included — retails for $300 new from Tesla. Works with standard 120V outlets and 240V NEMA 14-50 for up to 30 miles of range per hour.
📦
Massive Cargo Space
76 cu ft with rear seats folded. Frunk up front, powered liftgate in back — more space than most sedans.
📱
Over-the-Air Updates
Tesla keeps improving this car via OTA software updates — new features without a service visit.
👤
Single Owner, No Accidents
One careful owner from new. Clean title, zero accidents, zero insurance claims. Exactly the history you want in a used car.
📋
Carfax Report Available
Full vehicle history report available on request. Nothing to hide — clean title, California car its whole life.
🏠
No Dealer, No Fees
Direct private party sale. Motivated seller relocating — no doc fees, no markup, no games.
